items.title: S01E01 - The Welcome Mat
items.summary: When newly-qualified teacher Bernard Hedges arrives at Fenn Street Secondary Modern School to start his first job, even he hasn't bargained on what awaits him.

infolabels.title: The Welcome Mat
infolabels.plot: When newly-qualified teacher Bernard Hedges arrives at Fenn Street Secondary Modern School to start his first job, even he hasn't bargained on what awaits him.

items.title: S01E02 - A Picture of Innocence
items.summary: Bernard Hedges has to use all his tact when a member of the art club produces some stunning life studies of one of his unruly class - in the nude.

infolabels.title: A Picture of Innocence
infolabels.plot: Bernard Hedges has to use all his tact when a member of the art club produces some stunning life studies of one of his unruly class - in the nude.

items.title: S01E03 - Maureen Bullock Loves Sir
items.summary: Things start hotting up for Bernard Hedges when a pupil gets a crush on him. He thinks that he is settling into the district rather well, but when Maureen Bullock is seen leaving his new flat the rumours begin to fly.

infolabels.title: Maureen Bullock Loves Sir
infolabels.plot: Things start hotting up for Bernard Hedges when a pupil gets a crush on him. He thinks that he is settling into the district rather well, but when Maureen Bullock is seen leaving his new flat the rumours begin to fly.

items.title: S01E04 - A Near Greek Tragedy
items.summary: Apollon Abapellogopholis means more problems for Bernard Hedges. Pronouncing his name is trouble enough, but when Appollon rings the school fire alarm he decides to take firm measures with the boy.

infolabels.title: A Near Greek Tragedy
infolabels.plot: Apollon Abapellogopholis means more problems for Bernard Hedges. Pronouncing his name is trouble enough, but when Appollon rings the school fire alarm he decides to take firm measures with the boy.

items.title: S01E05 - Barbarian Librarians
items.summary: Bernard Hedges' touching faith in the virtues of 5C is often misplaced. The worst seems to have happened when he entrusts them with the library key in order to look after the library, outside school hours.

infolabels.title: Barbarian Librarians
infolabels.plot: Bernard Hedges' touching faith in the virtues of 5C is often misplaced. The worst seems to have happened when he entrusts them with the library key in order to look after the library, outside school hours.

items.title: S01E06 - Student Princess
items.summary: An old flame from Bernard's student days turns up as a trainee teacher. She disrupts not only his life but 5C's as well.

infolabels.title: Student Princess
infolabels.plot: An old flame from Bernard's student days turns up as a trainee teacher. She disrupts not only his life but 5C's as well.

items.title: S01E07 - It's the Thought that Counts
items.summary: End-of-term at Fenn Street, and the staff wait for their traditional presents from their forms. Bernard's anticipation at the thought of what he might get from 5C is tempered by the news that the injured Mr Wiggins will be fit to return as 5C's form master next term.

infolabels.title: It's the Thought that Counts
infolabels.plot: End-of-term at Fenn Street, and the staff wait for their traditional presents from their forms. Bernard's anticipation at the thought of what he might get from 5C is tempered by the news that the injured Mr Wiggins will be fit to return as 5C's form master next term.

items.title: S02E01 - They're Off
items.summary: Bernard's attempts to teach maths by using betting as an example earns him admiration from not only 5C but a man who just happens to be painting the classroom walls.

infolabels.title: They're Off
infolabels.plot: Bernard's attempts to teach maths by using betting as an example earns him admiration from not only 5C but a man who just happens to be painting the classroom walls.

items.title: S02E02 - Common Law
items.summary: It's 5C to the rescue when Sharon is attacked on the common going home. Suspicion falls on Potter the Caretaker but how can he prove his innocence?

infolabels.title: Common Law
infolabels.plot: It's 5C to the rescue when Sharon is attacked on the common going home. Suspicion falls on Potter the Caretaker but how can he prove his innocence?

items.title: S02E03 - Panalal Passes By
items.summary: Bernard's efforts to stimulate interest in the Parent-teacher Association ends in chaos when Panalal, a young Indian boy, joins 5C.

infolabels.title: Panalal Passes By
infolabels.plot: Bernard's efforts to stimulate interest in the Parent-teacher Association ends in chaos when Panalal, a young Indian boy, joins 5C.

items.title: S02E04 - The Sporting Life
items.summary: Bernard's new job as sports master gives him the chance to help Eric Duffy solve a problem. Then Eric decides that one good turn deserves another.

infolabels.title: The Sporting Life
infolabels.plot: Bernard's new job as sports master gives him the chance to help Eric Duffy solve a problem. Then Eric decides that one good turn deserves another.

items.title: S02E05 - Norman's Conquest
items.summary: Potter the caretaker fought in the North Africa regiment during World War II - known as the "desert rats". So when Form 5C get the chance to adopt an animal, they decide on a Jerboa, otherwise known as a desert rat and decide to call him Norman.

infolabels.title: Norman's Conquest
infolabels.plot: Potter the caretaker fought in the North Africa regiment during World War II - known as the "desert rats". So when Form 5C get the chance to adopt an animal, they decide on a Jerboa, otherwise known as a desert rat and decide to call him Norman.

items.title: S02E06 - X Certificate
items.summary: Fenn Street is having an open day and each class must contribute, even 5C. The only problem is that no-one told Bernard.

infolabels.title: X Certificate
infolabels.plot: Fenn Street is having an open day and each class must contribute, even 5C. The only problem is that no-one told Bernard.

items.title: S02E07 - The Decent Thing
items.summary: After a particularly raucous night out, Bernard wakes up in a strange bed in a state of alcoholic confusion. Things get worse when he discovers the bed belongs to Sharon's mother.

infolabels.title: The Decent Thing
infolabels.plot: After a particularly raucous night out, Bernard wakes up in a strange bed in a state of alcoholic confusion. Things get worse when he discovers the bed belongs to Sharon's mother.

items.title: S02E08 - The Generation Gap
items.summary: Potter's on the warpath as someone has painted his wellies but 5C claim innocence. Bernard tries to get them interested in caring for geriatrics but the enthusiasm is lacking.

infolabels.title: The Generation Gap
infolabels.plot: Potter's on the warpath as someone has painted his wellies but 5C claim innocence. Bernard tries to get them interested in caring for geriatrics but the enthusiasm is lacking.

items.title: S02E09 - Life Without Doris
items.summary: Miss Ewell entertains an offer of migrating to Australia and the staff and kids rejoice. But if she goes then her role as Deputy Headteacher needs filling and Mr Price has his eye on it.

infolabels.title: Life Without Doris
infolabels.plot: Miss Ewell entertains an offer of migrating to Australia and the staff and kids rejoice. But if she goes then her role as Deputy Headteacher needs filling and Mr Price has his eye on it.

items.title: S02E10 - The School Captain
items.summary: The Headmaster, Mr Cromwell, decides to divide the school into houses. But Bernard discovers that 5C's voting methods do not run along the normal lines.

infolabels.title: The School Captain
infolabels.plot: The Headmaster, Mr Cromwell, decides to divide the school into houses. But Bernard discovers that 5C's voting methods do not run along the normal lines.

items.title: S02E11 - Out of the Frying Pan
items.summary: Fenn Street School dinners are not very appetising, and teachers and pupils alike are avoiding them. Bernard does his best to remedy the situation, but he discovers Mr Potter is in league with the cook.

infolabels.title: Out of the Frying Pan
infolabels.plot: Fenn Street School dinners are not very appetising, and teachers and pupils alike are avoiding them. Bernard does his best to remedy the situation, but he discovers Mr Potter is in league with the cook.

items.title: S02E12 - Mixed Doubles
items.summary: The Headmaster invites the staff out to dinner to celebrate his birthday - at their own expense. Abbott endeavours to copy Duffy's technique with the opposite sex, but after a night out with Maureen Bullock, he only lands himself in trouble with the police.

infolabels.title: Mixed Doubles
infolabels.plot: The Headmaster invites the staff out to dinner to celebrate his birthday - at their own expense. Abbott endeavours to copy Duffy's technique with the opposite sex, but after a night out with Maureen Bullock, he only lands himself in trouble with the police.

items.title: S02E13 - Dress Circle
items.summary: The staff arrange an outing to the theatre for the fifth form. But the redoubtable Miss Ewell dampens the enthusiasm of all concerned by disapproving of the choice of dress of some of the pupils.

infolabels.title: Dress Circle
infolabels.plot: The staff arrange an outing to the theatre for the fifth form. But the redoubtable Miss Ewell dampens the enthusiasm of all concerned by disapproving of the choice of dress of some of the pupils.

items.title: S03E01 - Ag Bow Rumber
items.summary: A new term starts at Fenn Street and this means even more trouble for Bernard Hedges. Apart from the day-to-day hazards of teaching 5C, he has to prepare his unruly bunch for their imminent launching on an unsuspecting world. As prospective school leavers, 5C have to consider their future prospects.

infolabels.title: Ag Bow Rumber
infolabels.plot: A new term starts at Fenn Street and this means even more trouble for Bernard Hedges. Apart from the day-to-day hazards of teaching 5C, he has to prepare his unruly bunch for their imminent launching on an unsuspecting world. As prospective school leavers, 5C have to consider their future prospects.

items.title: S03E02 - Stitches and Hitches
items.summary: Bernard gets engaged and Abbott gets appendicitis.

infolabels.title: Stitches and Hitches
infolabels.plot: Bernard gets engaged and Abbott gets appendicitis.

items.title: S03E03 - Knick Knack Taffy Whack
items.summary: Why does one set about weighing Fenn Street School? It seems that Bernard believes that acts like this will help prepare 5C for their entry into the great, wide world at the end of this term.

infolabels.title: Knick Knack Taffy Whack
infolabels.plot: Why does one set about weighing Fenn Street School? It seems that Bernard believes that acts like this will help prepare 5C for their entry into the great, wide world at the end of this term.

items.title: S03E04 - Enter Mister Sibley
items.summary: Duffy enters the embraces of the cold and harsh world outside school and finds it cold and harsh.

infolabels.title: Enter Mister Sibley
infolabels.plot: Duffy enters the embraces of the cold and harsh world outside school and finds it cold and harsh.

items.title: S03E05 - It's a St Bernard's Life
items.summary: When Smithy falls ill in the country, Bernard sees Reigate in all its rustic glory. He is quite smitten and dreams of the idyllic married life there, but his fiance, Penny, dreams otherwise.

infolabels.title: It's a St Bernard's Life
infolabels.plot: When Smithy falls ill in the country, Bernard sees Reigate in all its rustic glory. He is quite smitten and dreams of the idyllic married life there, but his fiance, Penny, dreams otherwise.

items.title: S03E06 - Two and Two Make Nun
items.summary: Maureen feels rejected, not only by Sir but now by Monsignor Sopwith.

infolabels.title: Two and Two Make Nun
infolabels.plot: Maureen feels rejected, not only by Sir but now by Monsignor Sopwith.

items.title: S03E07 - The Honour of the School
items.summary: Bernard has an annoying habit of being honourable - even when playing golf. But what of his pupils? When Duffy invites Sharon to a half-term Majorcan holiday, will the habit be catching?

infolabels.title: The Honour of the School
infolabels.plot: Bernard has an annoying habit of being honourable - even when playing golf. But what of his pupils? When Duffy invites Sharon to a half-term Majorcan holiday, will the habit be catching?

items.title: S03E08 - Cromwell's Last Stand
items.summary: When "Hank" Abbott, private detective, goes into action, he opens the cupboards that let out the skeletons. One produces a rash of honesty from Potter. The other makes Cromwell feel that Miss Ewell might yet be won back from Mr Sibley.

infolabels.title: Cromwell's Last Stand
infolabels.plot: When "Hank" Abbott, private detective, goes into action, he opens the cupboards that let out the skeletons. One produces a rash of honesty from Potter. The other makes Cromwell feel that Miss Ewell might yet be won back from Mr Sibley.

items.title: S03E09 - Catch a Falling Drop-Out
items.summary: Bernard and 5C drop in at the Conservative Club and make new friends. Maureen also makes a new friend, but he is more interested in dropping out.

infolabels.title: Catch a Falling Drop-Out
infolabels.plot: Bernard and 5C drop in at the Conservative Club and make new friends. Maureen also makes a new friend, but he is more interested in dropping out.

items.title: S03E10 - A Star is Born
items.summary: It takes a face in a thousand to star in an advertising campaign, but Bernard and Potter make it a two-horse race.

infolabels.title: A Star is Born
infolabels.plot: It takes a face in a thousand to star in an advertising campaign, but Bernard and Potter make it a two-horse race.

items.title: S03E11 - The Facts of Life
items.summary: When Bernard hears Abbott's version of the facts of life - which can only be described as high fiction - he feels that it is time to teach 5C the facts of life in an adult way.

infolabels.title: The Facts of Life
infolabels.plot: When Bernard hears Abbott's version of the facts of life - which can only be described as high fiction - he feels that it is time to teach 5C the facts of life in an adult way.

items.title: S03E12 - Situations Vacant
items.summary: With the end of the school term approaching, most of Fenn Street's form 5C are already fixed up with jobs, but animal-loving Dennis Dunstable still has no apparent future. Then Bernard has a brainwave which looks like the solution.

infolabels.title: Situations Vacant
infolabels.plot: With the end of the school term approaching, most of Fenn Street's form 5C are already fixed up with jobs, but animal-loving Dennis Dunstable still has no apparent future. Then Bernard has a brainwave which looks like the solution.

items.title: S03E13 - Peace in Our Time
items.summary: As 5C break up for the very last time, they prepare to take life by the throat, the shirt, the vest or anything else they can lay their hands on.

infolabels.title: Peace in Our Time
infolabels.plot: As 5C break up for the very last time, they prepare to take life by the throat, the shirt, the vest or anything else they can lay their hands on.

items.title: S03E14 - And Everyone Came Too
items.summary: Bernard and Penny dream of their wedding day: it should be the happiest day of their lives. However, Potter is chief usher, class 5C are guests, the meteorological department forecasts snow and there are those inevitable unforeseen problems.

infolabels.title: And Everyone Came Too
infolabels.plot: Bernard and Penny dream of their wedding day: it should be the happiest day of their lives. However, Potter is chief usher, class 5C are guests, the meteorological department forecasts snow and there are those inevitable unforeseen problems.

items.title: S04E01 - Identitwit
items.summary: Bernard has to say goodbye to his 5C class at Fenn Street School but his new class (4C) brings some unexpected problems.

infolabels.title: Identitwit
infolabels.plot: Bernard has to say goodbye to his 5C class at Fenn Street School but his new class (4C) brings some unexpected problems.

items.title: S04E02 - The Pruning of Hedges
items.summary: Bernard has finally decided to leave Fenn Street School, but he finds that resigning is not as simple as he had imagined.

infolabels.title: The Pruning of Hedges
infolabels.plot: Bernard has finally decided to leave Fenn Street School, but he finds that resigning is not as simple as he had imagined.

items.title: S04E03 - Viva La Revolution
items.summary: All contributions are gratefully accepted when magazine time comes around at Fenn Street School. But headmaster Cromwell's efforts to muster his usual support are thwarted by an irate local shopkeeper and Fenn Street's alternative press.

infolabels.title: Viva La Revolution
infolabels.plot: All contributions are gratefully accepted when magazine time comes around at Fenn Street School. But headmaster Cromwell's efforts to muster his usual support are thwarted by an irate local shopkeeper and Fenn Street's alternative press.

items.title: S04E04 - A Rather Nasty Outbreak
items.summary: Georgie Duffy is nervous. He is due to start his first term at Fenn Street School - three weeks late. But big brother Eric, a member of last year's 5C and an old hand at dealing with authority, explains that there is nothing to worry about.

infolabels.title: A Rather Nasty Outbreak
infolabels.plot: Georgie Duffy is nervous. He is due to start his first term at Fenn Street School - three weeks late. But big brother Eric, a member of last year's 5C and an old hand at dealing with authority, explains that there is nothing to worry about.

items.title: S04E05 - David and Goliath
items.summary: Bernard Hedges has left Fenn Street School and the gap has been filled by Mr Dix, a living example of everything a teacher should not be. The staff long for a new young champion to challenge this tyrant, but when David Ffitchett-Brown arrives wearing beads, they wonder just what sort of champion they have.

infolabels.title: David and Goliath
infolabels.plot: Bernard Hedges has left Fenn Street School and the gap has been filled by Mr Dix, a living example of everything a teacher should not be. The staff long for a new young champion to challenge this tyrant, but when David Ffitchett-Brown arrives wearing beads, they wonder just what sort of champion they have.

items.title: S04E06 - A.W.O.L.
items.summary: Cromwell's yo-yo obsession helps distract him from David's request for new school supplies, including a new television set that Mr Price attacked with Nitric Acid after his horse had lost a horse race. But between themselves and Potter they work out a cunning plan.

infolabels.title: A.W.O.L.
infolabels.plot: Cromwell's yo-yo obsession helps distract him from David's request for new school supplies, including a new television set that Mr Price attacked with Nitric Acid after his horse had lost a horse race. But between themselves and Potter they work out a cunning plan.

items.title: S04E07 - What's a Class Between Friends?
items.summary: When Cromwell succumbs to an attack of administrative megalomania, the Charge of the Light Brigade is cancelled, a class is lost at the cinema and Mr Price is driven to drink.

infolabels.title: What's a Class Between Friends?
infolabels.plot: When Cromwell succumbs to an attack of administrative megalomania, the Charge of the Light Brigade is cancelled, a class is lost at the cinema and Mr Price is driven to drink.

items.title: S04E08 - Our Mr Price
items.summary: It looks as though Fenn Street will lose yet another teacher when Price applies for a job in industry. But can he really make the break?

infolabels.title: Our Mr Price
infolabels.plot: It looks as though Fenn Street will lose yet another teacher when Price applies for a job in industry. But can he really make the break?

items.title: S04E09 - Black Power
items.summary: Potter's repeated demands for an assistant are finally heeded, and Sidney Noakes arrives at Fenn Street.

infolabels.title: Black Power
infolabels.plot: Potter's repeated demands for an assistant are finally heeded, and Sidney Noakes arrives at Fenn Street.

items.title: S04E10 - False Alarm
items.summary: The amalgamation with neighbouring Weaver Street and the possibility of Fenn Street going comprehensive is more than the Fenn Street staff can cope with. Potter has to decide where his loyalties lie.

infolabels.title: False Alarm
infolabels.plot: The amalgamation with neighbouring Weaver Street and the possibility of Fenn Street going comprehensive is more than the Fenn Street staff can cope with. Potter has to decide where his loyalties lie.

items.title: S04E11 - Sibley, Mumsie, Dodo and Georgie
items.summary: For Miss Ewell, life is not exactly a bowl of cherries at the moment. There is the school inspection to be organised, and the new Weaver Street kids to keep under control.

infolabels.title: Sibley, Mumsie, Dodo and Georgie
infolabels.plot: For Miss Ewell, life is not exactly a bowl of cherries at the moment. There is the school inspection to be organised, and the new Weaver Street kids to keep under control.

items.title: S04E12 - United we Sit
items.summary: Headmaster Cromwell makes a new rule about haircuts and skirts at Fenn Street School. But the kids won't take this lying down, they decide on a sit-in to ask for pupil representation on staff meetings.

infolabels.title: United we Sit
infolabels.plot: Headmaster Cromwell makes a new rule about haircuts and skirts at Fenn Street School. But the kids won't take this lying down, they decide on a sit-in to ask for pupil representation on staff meetings.

items.title: S04E13 - Nemesis for Norman
items.summary: Potter's boasting about his war career gets out of hand when he is chosen to carry the banner at his El Alamein reunion.

infolabels.title: Nemesis for Norman
infolabels.plot: Potter's boasting about his war career gets out of hand when he is chosen to carry the banner at his El Alamein reunion.

items.title: S04E14 - Old Fennians Day
items.summary: Cromwell's latest idea is a school song for the first meeting of his newly-formed Old Fennians Association. With the staff bursting into a flurry of musical activity, and the return of the old Form 5C for the big event, it is a day to remember.

infolabels.title: Old Fennians Day
infolabels.plot: Cromwell's latest idea is a school song for the first meeting of his newly-formed Old Fennians Association. With the staff bursting into a flurry of musical activity, and the return of the old Form 5C for the big event, it is a day to remember.

items.title: S04E15 - What Are You Incinerating?
items.summary: The headmaster's "Clean Up Fenn Street" campaign is in full swing. But when Potter takes on some temporary assistance, an explosive situation develops which threatens to clean up Fenn Street for good.

infolabels.title: What Are You Incinerating?
infolabels.plot: The headmaster's "Clean Up Fenn Street" campaign is in full swing. But when Potter takes on some temporary assistance, an explosive situation develops which threatens to clean up Fenn Street for good.

items.title: S04E16 - The Ugly Duckling
items.summary: Miss Ewell gets her "mountie", Miss Petting her mandarin and Daisy her "prince".

infolabels.title: The Ugly Duckling
infolabels.plot: Miss Ewell gets her "mountie", Miss Petting her mandarin and Daisy her "prince".

items.title: S04E17 - Cup Fever
items.summary: Fenn Street School makes sporting history when its football team reaches the semi-final of the district cup. But Miss Ewell has a match of her own with the star of the team, and if she wins, the school loses.

infolabels.title: Cup Fever
infolabels.plot: Fenn Street School makes sporting history when its football team reaches the semi-final of the district cup. But Miss Ewell has a match of her own with the star of the team, and if she wins, the school loses.

items.title: S04E18 - Please Give Generously
items.summary: When Fenn Street School holds a charity walk for the local "old and needy", the staff are confident of its success. But deciding just who the "needy" are, can be a tricky business.

infolabels.title: Please Give Generously
infolabels.plot: When Fenn Street School holds a charity walk for the local "old and needy", the staff are confident of its success. But deciding just who the "needy" are, can be a tricky business.

items.title: S04E19 - Blodwyn All Over
items.summary: When the chairman of the Fenn Street School governors makes rash promises to his "niece", the whole school is affected. Cromwell gets a secretary, the kids get a pin-up, and Pricey gets a whole new outlook on life.

infolabels.title: Blodwyn All Over
infolabels.plot: When the chairman of the Fenn Street School governors makes rash promises to his "niece", the whole school is affected. Cromwell gets a secretary, the kids get a pin-up, and Pricey gets a whole new outlook on life.

items.title: S04E20 - The Price War
items.summary: Headmaster Cromwell has a new toy to help him communicate with the whole school, but Price does not want to keep in touch, for an old enemy is out to get him.

infolabels.title: The Price War
infolabels.plot: Headmaster Cromwell has a new toy to help him communicate with the whole school, but Price does not want to keep in touch, for an old enemy is out to get him.

items.title: S04E21 - The Fixer
items.summary: Wedding bells ring out for Miss Ewell and Mr Sibley. Meanwhile, Potter's ding-dong with his wife Ruby ends in a fly-away flourish.

infolabels.title: The Fixer
infolabels.plot: Wedding bells ring out for Miss Ewell and Mr Sibley. Meanwhile, Potter's ding-dong with his wife Ruby ends in a fly-away flourish.
